name: ecg-strip
title: ECG Strip
description: Illustrative animated ECG rhythm strip with rate and lead labels, from a waveform or canned sinus rhythm.

props.name: data
props.description: Waveform samples; falls back to a canned normal-sinus rhythm.

props.name: beats
props.description: Beats to draw when using the canned rhythm.

props.name: animate
props.description: Animate the stroke drawing on (reduced-motion safe).

props.name: showGrid
props.description: Draw a calibration grid — only pass with scaled/calibrated data.

clinicalNotes: This is explicitly NOT a diagnostic trace viewer. It renders an illustrative waveform for dashboards, monitoring UI, and brand motif — the accessible label says as much ("Not a diagnostic tracing"). It makes no measurement claims: the calibration grid is off by default and should only be enabled when you pass real calibrated samples with a known scale, otherwise the grid would imply a measurement standard the drawing does not meet. Animation is reduced-motion safe (the stroke draws only when motion is allowed) and it is self-contained — the keyframes are inlined and scoped per instance. Render one instance per view; a wall of animated traces is noise, not information.
notes: medcn-original. Self-contained SVG (pathLength=100 draw + inlined scoped keyframes); ties into the site ECG hero motif.
